scripts.buildUmd: parcel build src/index.js --dist-dir dist --no-source-maps && mv dist/index.js dist/chart.xkcd.min.js
scripts.start: npm run build && echo 'Built dist. Example uses: import chartXkcd from "../dist/index.js"'
scripts.prepublishOnly: rm -rf dist && npm run buildUmd && npm run build
scripts.genDoc: npx docdude --in docs --out docs-dist --title Chart.xkcd --subtitle 'xkcd styled chart lib'
scripts.genExample: echo 'Example HTML available at examples/example.html' && mkdir -p docs-dist && cp examples/example.html docs-dist/
scripts.deployDoc: npm run prepublishOnly && npm run genDoc && npm run genExample && gh-pages -d docs-dist
